title: stipa scholzii
intro: Stipa scholzii, also known as the Scholz's Needle Grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Native to Mexico, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stipa scholzii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
